name: @stackra/config
purpose: Configuration + DI namespace registry — derived from @nestjs/config, adapted for browser + Vite with dotenv and joi validation.
capabilities: dotenv + dotenv-expand loading with per-environment layers
when_to_use: Any package or app needs typed configuration authoring with env-loading and DI namespace registration.
when_not_to_use: For runtime-mutable per-tenant settings use @stackra/settings; for raw env access use @stackra/support's Env façade.
